channel.title: innovation on Nithin Kamath's personal homepage
channel.description: Recent content in innovation on Nithin Kamath's personal homepage

item.title: The core philosophies behind Zerodha
item.description: Whenever I’m at events or am meeting young entrepreneurs through Rainmatter, the one recurring question I get is what makes Zerodha what it is. We’d created this page to explain what makes us different.
